CustomField.description: Defines the number of days used for "N Day" rollup fields, counting backward from today. For example, a value of 365 means rollup fields like "Total Donations Last N Days" will include Opportunities closed within the past 365 days. Default is 365. Changing this value affects all N Day rollup fields across Contacts and Accounts.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Number of days from today used for "N Day" rollup calculations. Default is 365 (one year).
CustomField.label: Rollup N Day Value
